title: holcus distachyos
intro: Holcus distachyos, also known as Wood Millet or Wild Millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Holcus distachyos include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestive health. The herbal preparations of Holcus distachyos include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
